## ✨ Feature / Module Summary

A clear and concise description of the capability or hunt module you would like added.

## 🎯 Proposed Workflow

Explain how an operator or the automated bounty engine would interact with this feature:
- CLI command structure: `vulnforge hunt --new-module ...`
- GUI tab integration preview.

## 🛡️ Value Proposition & Ethical Safeguards

Describe how this feature enhances penetration testing efficiency while maintaining strict programmatic scope compliance.

## 💡 Additional Context

Add any other context, API references, or mockups about the feature request here.
